title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/context.py (第 461 至 667 行，共 667 行) ---
 461 |     def get_recent_files(self, limit: int = 10) -> List[str]:
 462 |         """
 463 |         获取最近操作的文件路径
 464 | 
 465 |         Args:
 466 |             limit: 返回的最大文件数
 467 | 
 468 |         Returns:
 469 |             文件路径列表（去重）
 470 |         """
 471 |         all_files = []
 472 |         for summary in reversed(self.session_summaries):
 473 |             all_files.extend(summary.get_file_paths())
 474 |             if len(all_files) >= limit:
 475 |                 break
 476 | 
 477 |         # 去重并保持顺序
 478 |         seen = set()
 479 |         unique_files = []
 480 |         for file_path in all_files:
 481 |             if file_path not in seen:
 482 |                 seen.add(file_path)
 483 |                 unique_files.append(file_path)
 484 | 
 485 |         return unique_files[:limit]
 486 | 
 487 |     def get_recent_errors(self, limit: int = 5) -> List[ErrorRecord]:
 488 |         """
 489 |         获取最近的错误记录
 490 | 
 491 |         Args:
 492 |             limit: 返回的最大错误数
 493 | 
 494 |         Returns:
 495 |             错误记录列表
 496 |         """
 497 |         all_errors = []
 498 |         for summary in reversed(self.session_summaries):
 499 |             all_errors.extend(summary.errors_encountered)
 500 |             if len(all_errors) >= limit:
 501 |                 break
 502 | 
 503 |         return all_errors[:limit]
 504 | 
 505 |     def search_summaries(self, keyword: str) -> List[SessionSummary]:
 506 |         """
 507 |         在摘要中搜索关键词
 508 | 
 509 |         Args:
 510 |             keyword: 搜索关键词
 511 | 
 512 |         Returns:
 513 |             包含关键词的摘要列表
 514 |         """
 515 |         results = []
 516 |         keyword_lower = keyword.lower()
 517 | 
 518 |         for summary in self.session_summaries:
 519 |             # 搜索摘要文本
 520 |             if keyword_lower in summary.summary_text.lower():
 521 |                 results.append(summary)
 522 |                 continue
 523 | 
 524 |             # 搜索任务目标
 525 |             if keyword_lower in summary.task_goal.lower():
 526 |                 results.append(summary)
 527 |                 continue
 528 | 
 529 |             # 搜索文件路径
 530 |             for file_change in summary.files_changed:
 531 |                 if keyword_lower in file_change.path.lower():
 532 |                     results.append(summary)
 533 |                     break
 534 | 
 535 |             # 搜索错误类型
 536 |             for error in summary.errors_encountered:
 537 |                 if keyword_lower in error.error_type.lower():
 538 |                     results.append(summary)
 539 |                     break
 540 | 
 541 |         return results
 542 | 
 543 |     def get_summary_statistics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 544 |         """
 545 |         获取摘要统计信息
 546 | 
 547 |         Returns:
 548 |             统计信息字典
 549 |         """
 550 |         if not self.session_summaries:
 551 |             return {
 552 |                 "total_summaries": 0,
 553 |                 "total_messages": 0,
 554 |                 "total_tokens": 0,
 555 |                 "avg_importance": 0.0
 556 |             }
 557 | 
 558 |         total_messages = sum(s.message_count for s in self.session_summaries)
 559 |         total_tokens = sum(s.token_count for s in self.session_summaries)
 560 |         avg_importance = sum(s.importance for s in self.session_summaries) / len(self.session_summaries)
 561 | 
 562 |         return {
 563 |             "total_summaries": len(self.session_summaries),
 564 |             "total_messages": total_messages,
 565 |             "total_tokens": total_tokens,
 566 |             "avg_importance": round(avg_importance, 2),
 567 |             "total_files_changed": sum(len(s.files_changed) for s in self.session_summaries),
 568 |             "total_errors": sum(len(s.errors_encountered) for s in self.session_summaries)
 569 |         }
 570 | 
 571 |     # =================...
